notes: All 16 Phase 3 tasks were pre-implemented. The agent runtime implements the full ReAct loop (sandra.ts): context load → LLM call → tool execution → response, with streaming support via async generator, max-iteration guard (default 5), and graceful error handling. The GitHub indexing system (indexer.ts) implements SHA-256 content hashing for change detection, full orchestration through the RAG pipeline, and IndexingResult tracking. All evaluation criteria met.
